title: Lucky's Vanilla
description: This is my Vanilla modpack, with performance and QOL mods to be the topper to vanilla minecraft.
body:
Welcome to Lucky's Vanilla Modpack!

Enhance your Minecraft experience with a carefully curated modpack that focuses on improving both the quality of life and performance aspects of the game. Dive into a world where gameplay is smoother, more efficient, and tailored to be Vanilla. You can even uninstall everything, and nothing would be lost!

Key Features:

  • Optimized Performance: Experience boosted fps gameplay with optimized performance-enhancing mods, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable Minecraft experience.
  • Quality of Life Improvements: Enjoy an array of mods designed to streamline various aspects of Minecraft, from peeking into shulker boxes to seeing the amount of bees/honey level in a hive.
  • Enhanced Visuals: Immerse yourself in stunning visuals with mods that enhance player models, textures, shaders, and lighting, elevating the overall aesthetics through the power of Iris into your Minecraft world.
  • Enhanced Sounds: Adding depth and realism to sound propagation, distance-based attenuation, block interactions, environmental effects, and player movements to immerse yourself in how Minecraft should sound.

How to Install:

The recommended way of installing the modpack is quick and easy:

  1. (Updated 2024) Get the Modrinth Desktop App
  2. (Updated 2025) If you have an issue updating the pack, click the gear icon and then the installation tab and repair
